short_reason: Solid, well-structured article with good keyword integration and logical flow. The sections on agentic workflows, E-E-A-T balance, and SEO pitfalls are practical and useful. The main weakness is originality — several sections (Real-Time Keyword Analysis bullets, Best AI Writing Tools comparison criteria, the step-by-step guide) feel templated and generic. The conclusion also trails off without a strong closing statement.
red_flags: Several sections read as generic listicles without specific examples, vendor callouts, or original insights
The 'Best AI Writing Tools for SEO' section describes what to look for rather than naming actual tools or providing a real comparison
The implementation guide section is brief and lacks concrete examples or a sample workflow illustration
The conclusion lacks a memorable closing line and ends on a generic 'for the year ahead' note
